zh.lifeSummary: 當Gottfried II. von Arnsberg於1157年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格時，他的父親Heinrich I. von Cuyk-Arnsberg30歲，母親Ermengard von Freusburg26歲。他和Agnes von Rüdenberg至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1236年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫阿斯格享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnsberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Swedish (of German origin): habitational name from a place called as ‘eagle's mountain’ (see   Arend   and   Berg  ), probably Ahrensberg in Mecklenburg. Compare   Darensbourg  .

variants.name: Arend
meanings: German: from the personal name Arend of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule’.

variants.name: Darensbourg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Aurore, Camile, Pierre.

Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of German Arensberg . It is formed with the French preposition de ‘from’, spelled d' before a vowel. This surname is found mainly among African Americans.

History: The progenitor of many of the Darensbourgs was Karl Friedrich Arensberg, a German born in Stettin in Pomerania (today Szczecin in Poland), who arrived in LA in 1721. By 1724, Darensbourg, as he came to be known, was de facto leader of the German colony in LA.

nameMeanings.name: Gottfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from god, got ‘god’ + frid ‘peace’; borne by the 13th-century poet Gottfried von Strassburg.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gottfried II. von Arnsberg was born in 1157, in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Heinrich I. von Cuyk-Arnsberg, was 30 and his mother, Ermengard von Freusburg, was 26. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Agnes von Rüdenberg. He died in 1236, in Arnsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 79.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes von Rüdenberg. Il est décédé en 1236, à Arnsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ko.Arnsberg, Wipperfürth, Oberbergischer Kr: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 오버버지슈어 크레이스 위p르프u르스 아른스버그
ko.lifeSummary: Gottfried II. von Arnsberg(이)가 1157년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 아른스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich I. von Cuyk-Arnsberg(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengard von Freusburg(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Agnes von Rüdenberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1236년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 아른스버그에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gottfried II. von Arnsberg родился в 1157 г. в местности арнсбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich I. von Cuyk-Arnsberg было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengard von Freusburg, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Agnes von Rüdenberg. Он умер в 1236 г. в местности арнсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 79 лет.
